case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. JOANN POLLARD et al

docket_entries.description: STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BROWN, TIMOTHY S SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT POLLARD, JOANN
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLLARD, JOANN $6,525.27 PRINCIPAL, $2,027.30 INTEREST, $296.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,848.57, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT POLLARD, JOANN DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-19-2012
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
DECLARATION JURISDICTIONAL FACTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST & WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC SERVED SEP-25-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT POLLARD, JOANN
